{"analysis":"I need to understand the full scene. Let me sample different parts of the image and also look at the rest of main's disassembly. The sky_color function blends between white and blue (0.5, 0.7, 1.0) based on the y-direction of the ray. I can see the checkerboard pattern logic in trace. Let me now sample the image more thoroughly and look at more assembly.","plan":"1. Sample key rows of the image to understand the scene
2. Look at the rest of main from 401c00 onwards
3. Disassemble sphere_intersect to understand calling convention","commands":[{"keystrokes":"sed -n '4,6p' /app/image.ppm | tr '\n' ' '; echo
